summary: Iteration 44: Non-pilot division SKU cleanup verification complete. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for admin review dashboard including ENT and Endo Surgery division filtering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Non-pilot division cleanup verified. ENT has products with brands MESIRE, MESIC, METIC, MYRAC, NOSZEL, MUKICT. Endo Surgery has products with brands ABSOMESH, MIRUS, MERICRON XL, Filamide, FILAXYN, FILAPROP, FILAPRON, Merineum. All admin review endpoints working: /api/admin/review/stats, /api/admin/review/products, /api/admin/review/families, /api/admin/review/smart-suggestions. Catalog divisions API returns 4 pilot divisions (Trauma, Cardiovascular, Diagnostics, Joint Replacement) - ENT and Endo Surgery are non-pilot and only visible through admin review dashboard.

admin_login.POST /api/admin/login: PASS - Returns token with correct password

review_stats.GET /api/admin/review/stats: PASS - Returns stats with by_division including ENT and Endo Surgery

review_products.GET /api/admin/review/products?division=: PASS - Returns ENT products with correct brands

catalog_divisions.GET /api/catalog/divisions: PASS - Returns 4 pilot divisions (ENT and Endo Surgery not included as expected)

frontend_ui.Review dashboard: PASS - Stats cards, filter bar, products table displayed
frontend_ui.Endo Surgery division filter: PASS - Shows Endo Surgery products correctly
frontend_ui.Smart Suggestions view: PASS - Summary cards and suggestions list displayed
